content.en:
"Several Dao Ancestors have passed down some things that can allow us to resist the erosion of purple light, but they are all one-time treasures, and they don't last long, but they are not given for nothing, and you need to exchange them with the points of the Void Sky One Vein!"

The Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch looked at everyone and said.

"Senior Brother Swallowing Moon, is the Void Sky One Vein Points System about to be opened?"

Peng Yu Tianjun asked curiously.

"Yes!"

Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch nodded, and immediately took out a ball of light, which instantly integrated into the main hall of the Void Heaven Palace, and said: "This is the Void Heaven One Vein Integral Subsystem given by the Dao Ancestor, and there are a large number of treasures stored inside, as long as they are not particularly rare treasures, they can be exchanged." "

As soon as these words came out, everyone showed a look of eagerness, eager to rob all the treasures in the light group, but this can only be imagined, and it is impossible to do it at all.

With Dao Ancestor's means, where would they be able to crack the light group, otherwise, the Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch would have cracked it himself.

The point system was opened, and the disciples of the Void Heaven in the Great Universe began to exchange for some treasures, and the treasure that everyone valued the most was undoubtedly the treasure that could resist the erosion of purple light.

Although the Purple Spirit Battle Armor can also resist the erosion of purple light, the effect is too ordinary, and it can still be used in ordinary places, but if you want to rely on the Purple Spirit Battle Armor to delusionally enter the Innate Origin Realm, it is undoubtedly a fool's dream.

The Void Heaven One Vein Subsystem provides a total of three treasures to resist the erosion of purple light.

One is the purple linyi, which is similar to the appearance of the Taoist uniform, which can automatically change the shape and color, from the aesthetic point of view, it is far more beautiful than the purple spirit battle armor, and it is more practical, and it is dozens of times stronger in resisting the erosion of purple light.

However, Zilin clothes are not cheap, one piece costs 100 points, and this price is not something that ordinary disciples can afford.

In addition to Zilinyi, there are also Wan Zizhu and Amethyst Crown, and the price is around 50 points.

In fact, in terms of the effect of resisting the purple light, the three treasures are almost the same, but the duration is different.

If it was in the Purple Light World, the three treasures could last for a long time, but if it was to enter the Innate Origin Realm, the Zilin Cloth was estimated to last for dozens of days, while the Ten Thousand Purple Beads and Amethyst Crown were estimated to only last for ten days.

However, no matter how good the treasure is, it may not be able to withstand all dangers, and if you really want to enter the Innate Origin Realm, anyone is in danger of falling.

......

Ye Tian registered an account first, and then received the points belonging to Daozi.

Dao Ancestor personally passed on the entry to receive 10,000 points, Ye Tian immediately received the 10,000 points, and then transferred to Pengyu Tianjun 3,000 points, which was the points paid for purchasing three thousand thunder chaos supernatural powers from Pengyu Tianjun.

At this time, Ye Tian still had 7,000 points in his hand, which seemed to be a lot, but in fact it was not much.

For example, if you buy a purple linyi, you need 100 points for one piece, and you can only persist in the innate origin for dozens of days, and after dozens of days, you will not be able to resist the erosion of purple light, and you need to buy zilinyi again.

It is conceivable that a person may need far more than one purple coat.

In addition, Ye Tian took a look at the prices of some treasures on the system, the most ordinary Chaos Divine Powers all cost 500 points, and the Chaos Divine Powers ranked among the three thousand Chaos Divine Powers require at least 2000 points, and some Chaotic Divine Powers against the sky require at least tens of thousands of points!

This is just the purchase of Chaos Divine Power, if you buy the corresponding high-level innate origin thing, it will need to pay a lot of price.

Therefore, 7000 points is not much at all.

Ye Tian didn't know what the situation of the Innate Origin was like, so he didn't rush to buy Zilin Yi to go in, but was ready to accumulate some more Void Heaven Points.

There are many ways to obtain Void Heaven Points, such as completing some tasks, but it is difficult to obtain any tasks here, you can also trade with others to obtain Void Points, or use your own treasures and systems to trade to obtain Void Points.

The third method, though, is the most stupid.

Because the price of the treasure recovered by the system is half of the normal price, or even lower.

For example, Ye Tian has a treasure in his hand, which can only be sold for 10 points when sold to the system, if he buys it from the system, it will cost at least 20 points, but if he sells it to others, he may be able to sell it for 18 points.

Therefore, the way to sell to other disciples to obtain points is undoubtedly the best way.

As a result, Ye Tian could trade within the Void Heaven Hall and trade obsidian.

Obsidian is an incredibly precious resource, and many people want it.

It's just that Ye Tian was only used to trade Chaos Divine Power before, and those people didn't have the Chaos Divine Power inheritance in their hands, so they couldn't trade obsidian gold at all.

But now that Ye Tian is trading obsidian gold for Void Heaven points, everyone in the disciples of the Void Heaven lineage can trade some obsidian.

Time passed, and Ye Tian had more and more Void Heaven Points in his hands.

10000 points!

20,000 points!

30,000 points!

Half a month has passed, and Ye Tian has accumulated more than 60,000 points in his hands.

With a lot of points in his hand, Ye Tian also became arrogant, and began to buy Chaos Divine Power and the corresponding innate origin things.

Ye Tian is not stupid, he will not buy those anti-heaven chaotic supernatural powers, because the price of those anti-heavenly chaotic supernatural powers is too high, and even if he is practiced, it is only the prototype of chaotic supernatural powers, at most comparable to the consummation realm of great supernatural powers, and it does not help him much.

Moreover, he only needs to practice a Chaotic Divine Power at present, condense the prototype of the Great Dao, and then engrave the Dao pattern on the Void Heaven Dao Body.

Therefore, it doesn't matter whether the Chaos Divine Power is powerful or not.

He wants quantity, not quality.

"King Kong Demon Magic Power, containing King Kong Avenue and Demon Demon Avenue, buy it!"

"Extreme sword supernatural powers, containing the avenue of fast and the avenue of knives, buy it!"

"The Void Heaven Sword Divine Power, containing the Void Heaven Avenue and the Sword Avenue, buy it!"

A gate of chaotic divine power and the corresponding innate origin thing fell into Ye Tian's hands, and after a while, Ye Tian's more than 60,000 points were almost exhausted, and only more than 1,000 points remained.

In exchange, there are 10 great divine powers and the corresponding innate origin things, and they are all chaotic supernatural powers carefully selected by Ye Tian, which do not coincide with his own chaotic supernatural powers, but the avenue contained is not too strong, only the avenue of swords and the avenue of swords are very good, they are the avenue of weapons, and they are the chaotic superpowers of the weapon path that Ye Tian has never touched.

And once the prototype of the Dao of the Sword is condensed, Ye Tian's Dao realm will rise greatly, and the Heavenly Dao system will become stronger.

Of course.

With so many chaotic supernatural powers, Ye Tian would also need a long time to practice, so he was not in a hurry.

At this time, the news from the Innate Origin Land finally came out.
